lines.speaker: Obli
lines.text: Welcome to Obli's General Store Bwana! Would you like to see my items?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, but thanks for the offer.

sections.title: Talking to Obli before completing Shilo Village

lines.speaker: Obli
lines.text: I'm getting out of here Bwana, the place is infested with zombies.
